request_description: Interactive session to review the implementation of a task/issue stateful execution over the workflow engineering cycle agent-identity.

decisions: ADD-ON UNIT TESTS: 3 sources — user in prompt, user mid-session (new/updated), Claude-generated from task analysis. Claude provides format on request.

task_workflow.title: Workflow task cycle interactive session review
task_workflow.description: title: workflow task cycle interactive session review description: interactive session to review the implementation of a task/issue stateful execution over the workflow engineering cycle agent-identity. do not build plan or execute anything. emulate the task workflow as if we were at that state.

session_data.work_summary: Interactive review of task workflow lifecycle. Ran validation quiz (25 checks across 5 stages: 16 passed, 0 failed, 6 N/A, 3 partial). Implemented: STAGE:/STEP: label sync on GitHub issues, validation checks for all 5 eligible stages, success story #21, I3 interface issue #766 with seeded plan. Identified 4 implementation gaps. 10 deferred todos for next session.

todo_snapshot.content: Wire advance_task_stage() to call issue_engineering_stage_sync() for automatic label sync on every stage transition
Ensure all 9 INITIAL steps are advanced via advance_task_step() during On Task Received protocol
Set task_workflow.issue_number from session issue at persist_state step
Fix update_session_data() to support dot-notation for nested object updates
Implement I3 Task Workflow Interface — live state machine viewer in Main Navigator (Issue #766)
Re-run INITIAL stage validation quiz to confirm all gaps are closed
Update CLAUDE.md with STAGE:/STEP: label convention + validation checks per stage + task continuation protocol
Update methodology/task-workflow.md with label sync, step labels, and continue-from-issue protocol
Document "Continue issue #N" prompt pattern in CLAUDE.md — how to resume a prepared task from its issue number
Add knowledge evolution entry v57 for STAGE:/STEP: labels + validation quiz + task continuation
